name: AddInPluginAttribute
summary: Optional attribute for use with an AddInPlugin derived class. If this attribute is not used, the default location for an AddInPlugin is AddInLocation.AddIn

constructors.name: AddInPluginAttribute(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Plugins.AddInLocation)
constructors.summary: Constructor AddInPluginAttribute, takes a single parameter giving the location of the Plugin in the Navisworks menus system

properties.name: CallCanExecute
properties.summary: Determines the conditions in which CanExecuteCommand should be called.

properties.name: CanToggle
properties.summary: Specifies if the command can toggle

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: The 16x16 icon to display for this command

properties.name: LargeIcon
properties.summary: The 32x32 icon to display for this command

properties.name: LoadForCanExecute
properties.summary: Specifies if CanExecuteCommand should cause the Plugin to load

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: Determines where the plugin is displayed in Navisworks menus system

properties.name: Shortcut
properties.summary: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for the command.

properties.name: ShortcutWindowTypes
properties.summary: The Ids of the windows for which the shortcut is valid. Multiple Ids can be specified by separating with ";". If Ids are specified the shortcut should be valid in all contexts.
